title: Micro Applications, Inc.
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Micro Applications, Inc.''' or '''MicroApp''' was a [[Computer/Legends|computer]] chip manufacturing corporation that was based on the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] colony [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], in the city of [[Tal'cara]]. Its generic chipsets were known to be used by a wide range of [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] and pocket computer makers.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-10-XXF -->''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''
